changes_made: No changes needed - the original wttr.in-based skill already achieves 100/100 on both tasks consistently across 2 runs. qwen3.5-122b correctly follows the skill instructions to fetch real weather data via curl and present it in well-formatted comparison tables.
notes: The model reliably uses wttr.in with the format codes from the skill, parses the output, and produces markdown tables with all required metrics (temperature, humidity, wind speed, conditions). Both weather-compare and weather-travel tasks pass all evaluation criteria including API call verification, metric presence, and LLM-judge quality assessments.
